en.extract:
The brown crake (Zapornia akool), or brown bush-hen, is a waterbird in the rail and crake family (Rallidae) found in South Asia. The species name, akool, is of uncertain origin.  It may come from Hindu mythology, or it may be a derivation of the Sinhalese word kukkula, which is used for both moorhen and watercock.

The '''brown crake''' ('''''Zapornia akool'''''), or '''brown bush-hen''', is a waterbird in the rail and crake family (''[[Rallidae]]'') found in South Asia. The [[specific name (zoology)|species name]], ''akool'', is of uncertain origin.  It may come from Hindu mythology, or it may be a derivation of the [[Sinhala language|Sinhalese]] word ''kukkula'', which is used for both [[moorhen]] and [[watercock]].<ref>{{cite book |title=The Helm Dictionary of Scientific Bird Names |url=https://archive.org/details/Helm_Dictionary_of_Scientific_Bird_Names_by_James_A._Jobling |first=James A. |last=Jobling |location=London, UK |publisher=Christopher Helm |year=2010 |isbn=978-1-4081-2501-4}}.</ref>
[[File:Brown Crake in Bhigwan August 2025 by Tisha Mukherjee 02.jpg|thumb|''Zapornia akool'' swimming in [[Bhigwan]], Maharashtra, India.]]

zh.extract:
红脚苦恶鸟（学名：Zapornia akool），又称红脚田鸡，是鹤形目秧鸡科的一种鸟类。
原为Amaurornis akool (Sykes, 1832)，现接受名为Zapornia akool (Sykes, 1832)。
2022年，为了与其新的分类地位相符，“中国鸟类名录”10.0版将红脚苦恶鸟的中文名修订为红脚田鸡。


特征
红脚苦恶鸟体重约131.43克，翼长约119.2毫米，嘴峰长约31.8毫米，喙宽度约4毫米，喙厚度约8毫米，跗蹠长约47.6毫米，尾长约54毫米。红脚苦恶鸟是部分迁徙的鸟类，其栖息在密集的湖泊、沼泽等湿地环境中，食性为肉食性。


亚种
Z. a. akool：分布于印度至孟加拉国和缅甸西部。
Z. a. coccineipes：分布于中国东南部至越南东北部。
